description: An in-depth look at plant growth, development, respiration, photosynthesis, mineral nutrition, and water relations. Experimental approaches will be used to demonstrate principles described.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Satisfied Quantitative Reasoning (QR) A requirement, sophomore standing, and (ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  151,BOTANY/​BIOLOGY  130,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101, orBIOCORE 381), or graduate/professional standing
